note: Scenario contract for the local resource pre-flight guard. SCN-099-A02/A03/A04/A05 (evaluator below-threshold, fail-loud missing key, override warning, no-secret) are unit-proven under SCOPE-01 by internal/preflight/preflight_test.go. SCN-099-A06 (SST thresholds flow to generated env) is proven by the generated env files + the SCOPE-02 wiring contract test. SCN-099-A01 (standalone pre-flight passes with headroom) + SCN-099-A05 (heavy-op wiring drift detector) are proven under SCOPE-02 by internal/preflight/wiring_contract_test.go plus a real ./smackerel.sh pre-flight run. SCN-099-A07 (docs) is a docs-review scenario under SCOPE-03. Every scenario links 1:1 to its owning scope and a report.md evidence anchor.

scenarios.title: Standalone pre-flight passes when the host has headroom
scenarios.given: the host has more than the SST minimums (PREFLIGHT_MIN_AVAILABLE_RAM_MB / _DISK_GB) free
scenarios.then: the command prints current-vs-required for RAM and disk and exits 0

scenarios.title: Below threshold reports current-vs-required and exits 1
scenarios.given: SST minimums for RAM and disk and observed host resources below at least one minimum
scenarios.then: it returns a non-zero exit code and the report states current free RAM/disk vs the required minimum plus remediation

scenarios.title: A missing threshold key fails loud (NO-DEFAULTS)
scenarios.given: an env map missing PREFLIGHT_MIN_AVAILABLE_RAM_MB or _DISK_GB (or empty / non-numeric / non-positive)
scenarios.then: it errors naming the offending key and never substitutes a silent default

scenarios.title: Override bypasses the gate with a loud WARNING
scenarios.given: observed resources below the minimum and the override flag set
scenarios.then: it returns exit code 0 and the report contains a loud WARNING that the check was overridden

scenarios.title: Heavy ops invoke the guard; the contract test proves wiring
scenarios.when: the drift-detector contract test parses it
scenarios.then: build, up, and test integration|e2e|e2e-ui|stress each call smackerel_assert_host_resources, the helper invokes cmd/preflight, the pre-flight command exists, and an adversarial mutation removing the guard from a heavy-op block is rejected

scenarios.title: SST thresholds flow to the generated env files
scenarios.then: config/generated/dev.env and test.env carry PREFLIGHT_MIN_AVAILABLE_RAM_MB and PREFLIGHT_MIN_AVAILABLE_DISK_GB with positive integer values

scenarios.title: Docs describe the resource guard and its boundary
scenarios.then: the docs state which heavy ops are gated and which are not, the SST thresholds (runtime.preflight.*) and the override env var, and that the guard protects local CLI ops only, not the self-hosted apply
